svg.text: ECO-SIM: Tapir × Cerrado Fruits - Megaherbivore Endozoochory
Tapirus terrestris moving between Gallery Forests and Open Cerrado

g.text: Tapirs link refuges to Cerrado by commuting.
Dry-season scarcity narrows routes to rivers.
Large fruits move intact across habitat edges.
Latrines focus seed rain near moist corridors.
Tapirs are key long-distance plant engineers.
Yellow drops = seeds via long tapir transport.
